target: Testmaster English learning platform - 9 user-requested fixes verification
summary: VERIFIED 9/10 features. Reading has 3 questions, Grammar has examples, TTS endpoint works, Vocabulary shows emojis, speaker buttons present, Grammar games have 5 types, Vocab games rotate by lesson, Lesson 4 has review games, Error Hunter works with feedback. MINOR BUG: Reading question text shows raw HTML class names instead of formatted text.

ui_bugs.issue: Reading question shows raw HTML class names: 'Who says "text-indigo-600 bg-indigo-50 px-1 rounded">Hello, Tom?' instead of formatted quoted text

GRAMMAR_EXAMPLES_SHOWN.evidence: Rule 'Who is ___?' with 3 examples: 'Who is your teacher?', 'Who is that boy?', 'Who is she?'

VOCABULARY_SHOWS_EMOJIS.description: Vocabulary section displays emojis (not stock photos)
VOCABULARY_SHOWS_EMOJIS.evidence: Word 'hello' shows 👋 emoji in vocabulary card

VOCABULARY_SPEAKER_BUTTONS.description: Vocabulary has speaker buttons for TTS playback
VOCABULARY_SPEAKER_BUTTONS.evidence: Volume2 icon button visible next to IPA pronunciation and example sentence

GRAMMAR_GAMES_5_TYPES.evidence: Badge shows 'Grammar Game 1 of 5', includes word_order, fill_blank, error_hunter, true_false, multiple_choice_grammar

VOCAB_GAMES_ROTATE_BY_LESSON.evidence: Badge shows 'Game 1 of 4' with 'Listen & Choose Picture' game type

LESSON_4_REVIEW_GAMES.description: Lesson 4 has review games: crossword, word_search, board_game
LESSON_4_REVIEW_GAMES.evidence: Badge shows 'Game 1 of 3' with 'Crossword Puzzle' game, colorful grid with Across/Down clues

ERROR_HUNTER_WORKING.description: Error Hunter game works - clicking error word shows correct feedback
ERROR_HUNTER_WORKING.evidence: Sentence 'Who are he?' with clickable word buttons. Clicking 'Who' shows 'Not that one!' feedback with 'are → is' correction and explanation

ALL_UI_TEXT_ENGLISH.description: All UI text is in English (no Turkish text)
ALL_UI_TEXT_ENGLISH.evidence: All screenshots show English text: 'Warm-up', 'Vocabulary', 'Reading', 'Grammar', 'Grammar Games', etc.

action_items: FIX: FormattedQuestion component showing raw HTML class names in reading questions - the regex for quoted text replacement is outputting escaped HTML
critical_code_review_comments: FormattedQuestion line 60-61 regex replacements produce valid HTML but dangerouslySetInnerHTML may be double-escaping when question text contains both single and double quotes
Reading questions work correctly when text only has single quotes, but mixed quote scenarios show raw class names

success_rate.backend: 100% - TTS endpoint and lesson data APIs working
success_rate.frontend: 95% - 9/10 features verified, 1 minor display bug in reading questions

seed_data_creation: None required - used existing enriched lesson content
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 58 verified 9 features for Testmaster platform post-enrichment. All major features work: Reading 3 questions, Grammar examples, TTS endpoint, emojis in vocab, speaker buttons, 5 grammar game types, vocab game rotation, L4 review games, Error Hunter. ONE BUG: Reading questions with double-quoted text like 'Who says "Hello, Tom"?' display raw HTML class names instead of formatted text. The FormattedQuestion component's regex may need adjustment for text with both single and double quotes.
